dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires price to open above daily pivot level on intraday charts. Entry condition uses open > pivot. Exit condition uses reasonable reversal logic (close < pivot) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Hold_days_max set to 1 since this is an intraday signal. Stop loss set to conservative 2% as no explicit stop was provided.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires price to open above daily pivot level on intraday charts. Entry condition uses open > pivot. Exit condition uses reasonable reversal logic (close < pivot) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Hold_days_max set to 1 since this is an intraday signal. Stop loss set to conservative 2% as no explicit stop was provided.

source_rule_text: When price opens above a pivot on an intraday chart, it signals a bullish day ahead.
